failure_reason: Addressed the continuity gate by preserving the grok worktree, then wired the first production caller to brcr-realize. The Rust route-loader prelude now includes choice-receipt, bml-source, branch-choice-order, and bml-route-choice-runtime for route manifests. production-routes.fk exposes route_choice_signature on native mutation default/public-gate responses and inside decision_receipt, computed from brcr-realize over the same mutation kh-route rows used by the manifest. Manifest name-check and native mutation public-gate pytest pass.
